你我必须阻止他 为什么 You and I cannot let that happen. Why not?
因为他三分之一的资产投在核能上 Because a third of his fortune is tied up in nuclear energy.
支持核能的商人进入白宫对桑科不利 Sancorp does not want a pro-nuclear businessman in the White House.
反正市场正在转向天然气 The market is shifting toward natural gas anyway.
但塔斯克想拖住甚至扭转这个倾向 But Tusk wants to stall that shift or reverse it.

他有 他和沃克关系很近 This one would. He and Walker are very close.

对我们都不是什么好事 to seep Sancorp's position in the marketplace diminished.

有危险就不会接受任命 if he thinks his holdings are at risk.

看看他们有没有什么愿意考虑的办法 and see if this is something they might be willing to consider.
总统周五就会宣布塔斯克的事 The President announces Tusk on Friday,
所以我们时间不多了 so we don't have a lot of time.

他要是办不成 我就单枪匹马了 If he doesn't deliver, I'm an invader without an army.
他要是办成了 我还有点机会 If he does, I've got a fighting chance.
我只是觉得 I just didn't feel that
我们没法再积极地共事下去了 we could work together constructively any longer.
我觉得这是个正当理由 I think that's a perfectly legitimate reason...
当然是 Of course it is.
但你不能以怀孕为理由开除她 But what you can't do is fire someone for being pregnant.
她是这么说的吗 Is that what she's saying?
科尔女士声称你亲口说 Ms. Cole claims that you said,

还有 去照顾你的孩子吧 and, quote, "Go focus on your baby."
我能看一眼吗 Can I see that?
一派胡言 我 That's completely false. I...
我从没说过这些 她说你有 I never said that. She claims you did.
那就是对质了 对吗 It's her word against mine, right?

这是勒索 This is extortion.
我们不想上法庭 克莱尔 We don't want this going to trial, Claire.
你和你丈夫都是公众人物 You and your husband are public figures.
这会产生不利报道 This will result in some very bad press.
我建议跟他们庭外和解 I suggest we go back to them with a settlement offer.
我们需要逮捕记录 没有啊 We need the arrest record. There isn't any.

如果安德伍德参与了的话 If Underwood was involved,
那就是滥用职权和腐败了 we are talking abuse of powers and corruption.
我查过了 I checked.
没有立案 没有存档照 什么也没有 There's no files, no mug shot, nothing.
那我们就得找拦车的警察 Then we need to find the cop who pulled him over,
或者看到他进警局的人 or somebody who saw him come into the station.
但是特区的警察 他们相互照顾 But D.C. Cops... they look after each other.
我们得小心点 We need to be careful.
你在警局有联络人吗 Do you have any sources on the force?
没有能在这种事上信得过的人 Not that I would trust with something like this.
卢卡斯当年是做犯罪版的 You know, Lucas started out on the crime beat.
我去问问他认识谁 I can see if he knows anyone.
他会帮我们吗 我不知道 Would he help us? I don't know.
可能吧 帮对手的忙 Maybe. Help out a competitor?
我们 一直有联系 We... stayed in touch.
你逗我呢 You've gotta be kidding me.
这个世界真够乱的 This town is way too incestuous.
我知道这事很大 I know it's a lot to ask.
你跟弗兰克的事我还没想通呢 佐伊 I'm still trying to wrap my head around the affair, Zoe.
如果你能给我介绍个人再为我做担保 If you could just give me a contact and maybe vouch for me...
你是不是故意等到现在才说 Did you wait to bring this up until now
觉得我这会儿不好拒绝 because you thought it'd be harder for me to say no?
什么意思 在我们刚上过床… What do you mean? In bed, right after we...
你真以为我会做那种… You don't actually think I would do something like...
看起来就是这样 这是大事 卢卡斯 It sure seems that way. This is huge, Lucas.
我在极力避免毁掉我们之间的… I'm trying to avoid fucking up what we have...
不论是什么 但你却让我很为难 Whatever that is... and you're making it really hard for me.
我恐怕永远都没法不让你为难 I don't know that I'll ever be the kind of person that makes it easy.
我不指望会简单 I'm not looking for easy.
但也别总让我想起他 But I don't need to be reminded of him.
我没法改变过去 我知道 I can't erase what I did. I know you can't.
但你这就是在摆布我 But this is really fucking manipulative.
你之前说的话是真心的吗 Did you mean what you said the other night?
你可能… That you probably...
那种话让我不知所措 I don't know what to do when I hear something like that.
所以在去机场的路上才一言不发 That's why I was so quiet when you drove me to the airport.
我当时生气 冲口而出 I was angry. I just blurted it out.
我希望我没说 至少不要那么说 I wish I hadn't. At least not like that.
我不是因为你说了那话而想利用你 I'm not trying to take advantage of you because you did.
他什么也没说 你也没问 He hasn't said a word. And you haven't brought it up?
我只问他是否还在考虑塔斯克 I just asked him if he was still considering Tusk.
他说是 但想先跟你谈谈 He said yes, but that he wanted to speak to you first. That's it.
真想知道他们聊过没 I wish we knew if they'd spoken at all.
他有专线 我没法追查 Well, he has a private line. I can't track those calls.
弗兰克 总统先生 Frank. Mr. President.
说说圣刘易斯的情况吧 Tell me about St. Louis.
很难看出他在想什么 我尽力试探了 He's a hard man to read. I did my best to probe him,
但还是看不出他的倾向 but I don't think I left any wiser to which way he's leaning.
但我得说 I must say, though,
他无疑是最佳人选 I think he is by far and away the best candidate.
为什么那么说 Why do you say that?
提名一个你了解的人不是更合理吗 Doesn't it make sense for you to nominate someone you know so well?
我不了解他 所以才派你去圣刘易斯 I don't know him. That's why I sent you to St. Louis.
抱歉总统先生 我不是那个意思 Forgive me, Mr. President. I didn't mean it that way.
我是说全世界都了解他 I meant that the world knows so well.
你 我 所有人都知道雷蒙德·塔斯克 You, me, everyone knows Raymond Tusk.
他的厉害我们不必多说 We don't need to convince anyone of his worthiness.
但你说他依然很犹豫 But you said he still seems ambivalent?
所以我觉得您应该亲自行动 Which is why I think you should make a personal overture.
请他来白宫 Invite him to the White House.
我不想显得太急切 Well, I don't want to appear desperate.
我赞成弗兰克 I agree with Frank.
请他来 这办法很好 Inviting him is a very good idea.
如果您真想用塔斯克 就跟他同桌共饮 If you're serious about Tusk, you should wine and dine him.
让他觉得自己很特别 Make him feel very special.
我想能为他安排出时间 I'm sure we can find time in the schedule.
让他再考虑几天吧 Let's give him a few more days.
我们时间不够一周了 先生 We have less than a week, sir.
不能迟过周五 I wouldn't wait any later than Friday.
周五可以 先生 We can make Friday work, sir.
好吧 那就看看他能不能来 All right. Well, let's see if he's available.
你在干什么 What are you doing?
给我你手机 为什么 Give me your phone. Why?
快给我 Just give it to me.
你注意到家里有什么怪事吗 Have you noticed anything weird in here?
东西动地方 或是不见了 Stuff moved around? Anything missing?
没有 有人跟踪你吗 No. Anyone following you?
你发现什么了 What did you find out?
事情很严重 佐伊 This is serious, Zoe.
涉及到了警察局长 It goes way up, as high as the commissioner.
我跟警队的联络人好说歹说才拿到这个 I had to beg my contact at Metro to give me this.
没有罗素被拦下的记录 No record of Russo getting pulled over,

这是她之前一次被捕的案宗 That's a file on one of her previous arrests.
我调查过警察掩盖案件 I've investigated police cover-ups before.
我持续一年收到死亡威胁 I got death threats for a year.

愿意 Yeah.

但一时半会儿也办不成啊 but that doesn't happen overnight.
这种事很复杂的 There's a lot of machinery in a corporate attack like this.

我不会安排你们会面 你知道规矩 I'm not sitting you down with Scott. You know the rules.
现在是特殊情况 These are extraordinary circumstances.
弗兰克 桑科的高管 Frank, Sancorp's officers
绝不会跟政客会面 do not meet with politicians, period.
你跟我谈 我转述给斯科特·坎宁汉 You talk to me, I talk to Scott Cunningham,
或是反过来 这是规矩 and vice versa. That's how it works.
好吧 雷米 就按你说的吧 All right, Remy. Whatever you think best.
有消息我会通知你 I'll call you when I know more.
南希 Nancy!
我所尊重的东西里 Of all the things I hold in high regard,
不包括"规矩" rules are not one of them.
如果可以直接接触供货商 I will not place my fate solely in the hands of the middleman
我就不会把命运完全交给中间人 if I can go directly to the supplier.

得有个人去趟林奇堡 One of us has to go to Lynchburg.

我必须和你谈谈 I needed to speak with you.

我们一直力图避免这种巧合 Those are the sort of coincidences we want to avoid.

没有 而且我预感我也不想知道 He didn't. And I have a feeling I'd rather not be told.
相信我 你会想知道的 Trust me, you want to know.

能说实话可轻松多了 It's much easier when you can tell the truth.
拜托 别让我不得不撒谎脱身 Please, don't put me in a position where I have to lie.

这届政府就会 you will see this administration
不再支持天然气 转而支持核能 shift its support toward nuclear energy and away from natural gas.
你得去收购他的子公司和供货商 His subsidiaries and his suppliers, go after them.
弗兰克 谈话该到此为止了 Frank, we should end this conversation right now.
如果让他觉得资产保密委托后 He will not accept the nomination
他将无法对抗面临的威胁 if his assets are in a blind trust
他就不会接受提名了 and he can't fight off the threat.
别再说了 斯科特 Okay, we're done. Scott...
我一个字都不想再听了 I don't wanna hear another word.
回机场去吧 Go back to the airport.
给今天来亚特兰大找个好理由 Figure out a good reason you needed to be in Atlanta today.
在前面转弯处靠边停吧 You can pull over at the next corner.
我会叫车来接我 I'll have my car pick me up.
来最后一杯吗 继续倒 One last one? Another.
要喝点什么吗 白葡萄酒 Can I get you something? White wine.
记在我账上 Put that on my tab.
谢谢 荣幸之至 Thank you. My pleasure.
很快就不能点单了 They're about to call last call.
没关系 我也不是很能喝 That's all right. I don't have much of a tolerance.
再来一杯吗 One more?
不用 就这样吧 No. I'm good.
你该上楼去睡 You should head upstairs.
我在等你 I was waiting for you.
那是新的水龙头吗 是的 Is that the new faucet? Yeah.
进展如何 How'd it go?
不是很好 雷米有所企图 Not good. Remy's up to something.
也不回我电话 He's not returning my phone calls.
我能做什么 What can I do?
告诉我你梦到了什么 Tell me what you were dreaming.
很可怕 弗兰西斯 Oh, it was so awful, Francis.
他也让我无法入睡 He's not letting me sleep either.
不是他 是孩子们 Yeah. It's not him. It's the kids.
我跟他们在后院玩 I was playing with them in the backyard,
女孩爬到藤蔓上去了 and the girl was climbing on the vines,
我一直劝她下来… and I kept telling her to stop and get down, and...
藤蔓突然把她缠住 就是不放开 The vines just took hold of her, and they wouldn't let go.
她厉声尖叫 And she was screaming so loud,
我就一直使劲拉 and I just kept pulling harder and harder,
后来她被撕成两半 and she just ripped in half.
好了 没事了 Come here. Come here. Okay.
天呐 Jesus!
你等到凌晨两点之后才回我电话 You wait until after 2:00 in the morning to return my call?
就想给我留言吧 You trying to get my voice-mail?
我要说的话不能在手机上说 The conversations we're having we can't be having on cell phones.
你在哪 Where are you?
克莱尔在楼上睡觉 Claire is sleeping upstairs.
你不该去见坎宁汉 You shouldn't have gone to see Cunningham.
他说你没有提起塔斯克 He says you didn't bring up Tusk.
你觉得他真会承认吗 You really think he'd admit to that?
如果我们这么做 就是内线交易 If we go through with this, it's insider trading.
我觉得他不是第二次听到这消息 He didn't strike me as a man hearing the news for the second time.
你觉得我在耍你吗 You want to believe I'm playing games?
现在我就抽身而出 I can walk away from the whole thing.
但现在没别人能帮你了 But I'm all you've got right now.
是我在帮你和桑科 I'm the one doing you and Sancorp a favor,
不是反过来 not the other way around.
被利用我还看的出来 弗兰克 I can tell when I'm being used, Frank.
我只想知道为了什么 I just want to know what for.
我不会利用我事后不能甩开的人 I don't use people unless I can throw them away afterwards.
我是在强化我们之间的合作关系 I'm trying to strengthen our partnership.
我觉得你是在骗人 Smells an awful lot like bullshit.
别一副高高在上的口气 Don't condescend.
为你工作八年 Eight years I worked on your staff
我最多也就是站在你家门前 and never once made it further than your front doorstep.
现在我站在你家客厅了 弗兰克 Well, now I'm in your living room, Frank.
不是因为你的教导 It's not because of what you taught me,
而是我终于意识到我的价值 it's because I finally woke up to what my value is
和为你卖命是多么屈才 and how undervalued I was slaving away for you.
这是正事 伤心事自己知道就行 This is business. Keep your sob story to yourself.
我想坚守住 I want to maintain
我在白宫辛苦经营的影响力 the influence that I have worked to achieve in the White House,
这份影响力进而转化为 which translates into the influence
你在白宫的影响力 that you have in the White House,
都是通过我 through me.
我明天再跟斯科特谈谈 I'll get in touch with Scott again tomorrow.
看能不能尽快办妥 See if we can push this forward faster.
谢谢 雷米 Thank you, Remy.
但你得让我按我的方式来 But you gotta let me do this my way.
她说得很清楚 The message was very clear.
她不想和解 无论金额多少 She doesn't want a settlement, no matter what the figure.
即使我们把世界之井还她吗 Even if we give her World Well back?

我会继续施压 与此同时 I'll keep pushing them. But in the meantime,
你得整理一下 you should start gathering
你们之间所有的通讯 all the correspondence you ever had with her...
电子邮件 笔记 什么都别落下 E-mails, notes, every scrap of paper.

我只不过想找到她 All I'm trying to do is find her.
我有份2012年4月她被捕的记录 I've got an arrest record from April 2012,
我知道一月她和一位客户的车被警察拦下 and I know she was pulled over with a client in January.
那个姑娘 她非常有潜力 That girl. She had so much potential.
她为什么辍学 Why did she drop out?
我说过了 由于道德缘故 Like I said, it's an ethical breach for me
我不能透露任何… to discuss anything that has to do...
我和她父母谈过了 I spoke to her parents.
她父亲态度很横 Her father was very combative.
是家里的问题吗 Was there trouble at home?
父亲 是不是… The father... did he...
我不会谈瑞秋的事 I won't speak about Rachel.
能简要和我谈谈你的工作吗 Can you talk to me about your job in general,
概括下你都负责什么样的案子 the sorts of cases you deal with in an abstract way?
如果我担心某个学生 When I'm concerned about a student,
尤其是可能涉及到犯法行为时 especially if there's possible criminal activity involved,
我必须联系地方检察官办公室 it's my duty to contact the D.A.'s office.
如果地检提出控告 Now, if the D.A. pursues charges,
那名学生就得作证指控自己的父母 the student has to testify against their own parent.
让年轻人做这样的抉择太难了 That's a difficult decision for a young person to make.
非常难 Extremely difficult.
逃跑反倒容易些 It could be easier to run away.
会面定于明天 It's set for tomorrow.
